label: COBOL history
prompt: You research public web pages for factual background. For THIS task: fetch EXACTLY the single URL https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/COBOL and report what that page says about COBOL — its name, purpose, the year it was developed, and notable contributors. Do NOT use web search and do NOT fetch any other URL; fetch only that one page. Then call submitFindings with a concise factual note and cite that exact URL.
